mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, EMAIL, USER_NAME AS userName, STATUS FROM USERS
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (USER_ID, EMAIL, PWD_HASH) VALUES (SEQ_USER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{email}, #{pwdHash})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USER_NAME, EMAIL FROM USERS WHERE UPPER(EMAIL) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{email} || '%')
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USER_NAME AS userName, EMAIL FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT WS_ID, WS_NAME, INVITE_CODE, OWNER_ID FROM WORKSPACES WHERE OWNER_ID = #{userId}
